creator: lioux@uol.com.br
text:
It is a simple update of the netscape communicator 4.7 port.
	However, it comes as an alternate port not superseding the aforementioned one.
	Ppl gotta have choices.
	I kept the original maintainer because I did nothing.

How-To-Repeat: 
	Update www/netscape4-communicator/files/md5 with the 1st patch
	Then, create www/netscape472-communicator with the 2nt one
